text:
{"fixed_xml":"<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ITEM>
    <BIBL>
        <TITLE>Falckeisische Bibel</TITLE>
        <DESCRIPTION>noch gantz neu in </DESCRIPTION>
        <FORMAT>Schweins-leder</FORMAT>
        <DESCRIPTION>gebunden, </DESCRIPTION>
        <PRIZE>

12. Gulden</PRIZE>
    </BIBL>
    <OR>
        <BIBL>
            <TITLE>Corpore Juris</TITLE>
            <PLACE>Leipziger Edition</PLACE>
        </BIBL>
    </OR>
    <EXCHANGE>zu vertauschen.</EXCHANGE>
</ITEM>","number_of_corrections":7,"explanation":"1. Added XML declaration at the top.
2. Split the text into logical segments with appropriate XML tags: <DESCRIPTION> for additional descriptive text, <OR> to denote an alternative option, and <EXCHANGE> for the exchange clause.
3. Fixed the formatting of the prize (removed invisible characters and added proper line breaks).
4. Added missing closing tags for <ITEM> and <BIBL>.
5. Structured the nested <BIBL> elements under an <OR> tag to indicate an alternative.
6. Ensured all tags are properly nested and closed.
7. Added proper spacing and indentation for readability."}

parsed.fixed_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ITEM>
    <BIBL>
        <TITLE>Falckeisische Bibel</TITLE>
        <DESCRIPTION>noch gantz neu in </DESCRIPTION>
        <FORMAT>Schweins-leder</FORMAT>
        <DESCRIPTION>gebunden, </DESCRIPTION>
        <PRIZE>

12. Gulden</PRIZE>
    </BIBL>
    <OR>
        <BIBL>
            <TITLE>Corpore Juris</TITLE>
            <PLACE>Leipziger Edition</PLACE>
        </BIBL>
    </OR>
    <EXCHANGE>zu vertauschen.</EXCHANGE>
</ITEM>
parsed.explanation:
1. Added XML declaration at the top.
2. Split the text into logical segments with appropriate XML tags: <DESCRIPTION> for additional descriptive text, <OR> to denote an alternative option, and <EXCHANGE> for the exchange clause.
3. Fixed the formatting of the prize (removed invisible characters and added proper line breaks).
4. Added missing closing tags for <ITEM> and <BIBL>.
5. Structured the nested <BIBL> elements under an <OR> tag to indicate an alternative.
6. Ensured all tags are properly nested and closed.
7. Added proper spacing and indentation for readability.
